Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-30 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's rankings at position #1 with a score of 95.3, displaying exceptional consistency across all timeframes—it's up 152.81% over 1 year and 1455.78% over 10 years while outperforming SPY by 140.43 percentage points annually. The stock passes 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds and trades above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200), with a "strong_buy" signal driven by confirmed volatility and clean momentum readings. CLMT ranks second with a 165.54% 1-year return and strong 5-year performance (576.42%), but shows a critical weakness: its 10-year return of 165.93% severely lags its 5-year return, and it underperforms SPY by 45.45% over the decade, suggesting it may be a more recent outperformer rather than a sustained secular trend. Both stocks pass all SMA filters and beat SPY over 1-5 years, but LINC's superior long-term consistency and deeper history (6 years vs recent data) make it the momentum-ranker's clear top pick for investors focused on sustained multi-year trends.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
